description_long: This is a stylized humanoid figure with exaggerated features, including long, pointed ears and two large, horn-like protrusions on the head. The figure has pale skin and is dressed in a revealing, futuristic outfit consisting of a cropped top, short shorts, thigh-high stockings, and high-heeled shoes. An oversized, puffy jacket is draped over the shoulders, with the sleeves hanging loosely. The character's hair is long, thick, and styled into two large braids, each adorned with mechanical or decorative elements. The overall appearance is accentuated by bold, angular markings on the legs and a prominent, hanging banner with cryptic symbols.
description: A stylized humanoid with long braids, horn-like head features, and a futuristic, revealing outfit with an oversized jacket and high heels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the character's facial features, horn-like head protrusions, cropped top, and the hanging banner with symbols.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the draped jacket, and the mechanical elements in the hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the oversized jacket, the full length of the braids, and the exposed back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile, jacket, and hair accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic cropped top, short shorts, oversized puffy jacket, thigh-high stockings, high-heeled shoes, decorative leg banner
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: long thick braids with decorative elements
